name: Classic Lines Limo
recent_news: Yelp listing marked CLOSED as of October 2025; appears to be a small limousine service, not a school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Tiny limo operator, appears closed/inactive; not a school bus or student-transport contractor.

name: North East Transfer Inc
recent_news: No evidence of school bus operations; name and PA business directory listings suggest freight transfer/trucking, not student transportation.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Likely freight/transfer hauler in Mountain Top, PA; no link to student transportation. Separately note Mountain Top Bus Co. is a real school bus operator in the same town, but not this entity.

name: Transcare Medical
recent_news: Founded 2008; HQ 20 Satellite Dr, Winder, GA. Provides emergent/non-emergent ambulance and wheelchair van transport; no school district contracts disclosed.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Pure NEMT/ambulance operator, not a school bus contractor; would be a strategic miss for a student-transportation tuck-in.

name: Able Transport Inc
recent_news: CorporationWiki shows Carol Bepler as 'Previous President' of Able Transport, Inc. on US-1 in Sebastian, FL, suggesting recent leadership change or dissolution; no school bus presence found.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Tiny operator in Roseland/Sebastian FL with no evidence of student-transport contracts; leadership transition flagged suggests it may be dormant.

name: Aquarius Limousine Inc
recent_news: No evidence of school bus or special-needs student transport activity in Key West/Monroe County; appears to be a small Duncan St limousine operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Stand-alone Key West limo service; remote island geography and non-school service profile make this irrelevant to Summit's tuck-in thesis.
